name: claude-theater
description: Watch your Claude Code conversations and subagents work — a live office, inside VS Code.

claudeTheater.port.description: Port the Claude Theater server listens on (127.0.0.1).

claudeTheater.autoStart.description: Automatically run the Claude Theater server in the background when VS Code starts. Toggle this from the status-bar button.

claudeTheater.pythonPath.description: Path to the Python interpreter used to run the server. Empty = try `python`, then `py`, then `python3`.

claudeTheater.serverScript.description: Optional path to claude_theater.py. Empty = use the copy bundled with the extension (no install needed).
